'''旧暦3月6日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[803年]]_月_日） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令 * [[永仁]]5年（[[1297年]]_月_日） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が永仁の[[徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - 新選組の再組織隊・甲州鎮撫隊が甲州勝沼で官軍に敗北
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（[[1170年]]_月_日） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月5日 (旧暦)|3月5日]] 翌日[[3月7日 (旧暦)|3月7日]] - 前月[[2月6日 (旧暦)|2月6日]] 翌月[[4月6日 (旧暦)|4月6日]] *新暦[[3月6日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月6日'''（きゅうれきさんがつむいか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）

== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）

== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）

== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）

== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

--> == Events == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== Births == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== Deaths == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:友引]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:Days 6 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:new pages]]

{{Lunar March}} '''March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar March6れきさんがつむいか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。
--> == Events == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== Births == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== Deaths == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}}, {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}}{{Citation needed|date=2021-02}}. * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}}) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}}) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}}. The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}, the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}}, were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}}, {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}}, 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}}) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}}, {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}}) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}}, a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}}).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}}, {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}}{{Citation needed|date=2021-02}}. * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}}) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}}) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}}. The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}, the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}}, were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}}, {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}}, 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}}) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}}, {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}}) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}}, a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}}).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}}, {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}}{{Citation needed|date=2021-02}}. * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}}) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}}) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}}. The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}, the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}}, were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}}, {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}}, 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}}) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}}, {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}}) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}}, a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}}).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}}, {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}}{{Citation needed|date=2021-02}}. * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}}) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}}) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}}. The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}, the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}}, were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}}, {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}}, 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}}) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}}, {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}}) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}}, a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}}).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.

[[sn:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}}, {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}}{{Citation needed|date=2021-02}}. * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}}) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}}) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}}. The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}, the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}}, were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}}, {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}}, 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}}) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}}, {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}}) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}}, a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}}).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}}) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}}, {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}}{{Citation needed|date=2021-02}}. * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}}) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}}. * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}}) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}}. The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}}, the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}}, were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}}, {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}}, 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}}) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}}, {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}}) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}}, a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}}).

[[sn:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|旧暦|1=" to "|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq="
revision.text:
[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|qq70|ja|qq70年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|qq39|ja|qq39年}} ) (also said to be qq77). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|17qq|ja|17qq年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|qq70|ja|qq70年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|qq39|ja|qq39年}} ) (also said to be qq77). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|17qq|ja|17qq年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:New pages]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]

{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|qq70|ja|qq70年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|qq39|ja|qq39年}} ) (also said to be qq77). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|17qq|ja|17qq年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Ngoodbye $1]] [[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.

The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|公卿}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|越後国}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803年4月1日]]

{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803年4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803年4月1日]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711年}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803年}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722年}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year }} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297年}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868年}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648年}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719年}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139年}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year }} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year }} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year }} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170年}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year }} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803rd year 4月1日]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year }} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year }} ).

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year }} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year }} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year }} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year }} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year }} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year }} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year }} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year }} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year }} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803rd year 4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year }} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year }} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year }} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year }} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803rd year 4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year }} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year }} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year }} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year }} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803rd year 4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

revision.text:
[[sn:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[zh:三月初六]] [[en:draft:March 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦}} 22 ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year }} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year }} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year }} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year }} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year }} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year }} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year }} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year }} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year }} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:803rd year 4月1日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂|12=draft}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城|12=draft}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁|12=draft}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year|12=draft}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い|12=draft}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=draft}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=draft}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=draft}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩|12=draft}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=draft}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝|12=draft}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=draft}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=draft}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩|12=draft}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=draft}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝|12=draft}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=draft}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂|12=draft|12=draft}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=draft|12=draft}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=draft|12=draft}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=draft|12=draft}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=draft|12=draft}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂|12=draft|12=draft}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=draft|12=draft}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=draft|12=draft}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=draft|12=draft}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=draft|12=draft}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}} <!--3月6日 (旧暦)-->
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]]

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂|12=draft|12=draft}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い|12=draft|12=draft}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=draft|12=draft}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=draft|12=draft}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=draft|12=draft}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=draft|12=draft}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}} <!--3月6日 (旧暦)-->

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages to sort]] to [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:{{subst:PAGENAME}}}}[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 6 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 6 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 6 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}
