[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:March 6 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 6 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:March 6 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 6 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:March 6 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:March 6 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:三月初六]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|ja|延暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|803|ja|803rd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 1|ja|4月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Seii Taishōgun|ja|征夷大将軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|ja|坂上田村麻呂|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|ja|志波城|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02}} . * {{ill|Einin|ja|永仁|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|ja|1297th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 30|ja|3月30日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|March 29|ja|3月29日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|ja|甲州勝沼の戦い|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|ja|新選組|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|ja|慶安|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|ja|1648th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|ja|近衛基熙|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1722|ja|1722nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|ja|1719th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|ja|与板藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+{{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō|ja|嘉応|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|ja|1170th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 6|ja|4月6日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|ja|源為朝|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1139|ja|1139th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|ja|1711th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} member (* {{ill|1680|ja|1680th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月6日'''（きゅうれきさんがつむいか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[3月6日 (旧暦)]] to [[March 6 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月6日'''（きゅうれきさんがつむいか）は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[延暦]]22年（[[ユリウス暦]][[803年]][[4月1日]]） - [[征夷大将軍]]・[[坂上田村麻呂]]に[[志波城]]の築城命令{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[永仁]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1297年]][[3月30日]]） - [[鎌倉幕府]]が[[永仁の徳政令]]を発布 * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[3月29日]]） - [[甲州勝沼の戦い]]。[[新選組]]の再組織隊・[[甲陽鎮撫隊]]が甲州勝沼で[[官軍]]に敗北
== 誕生日 == * [[慶安]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1648年]][[4月28日]]） - [[近衛基熙]]、[[公卿]]（+ [[1722年]]） * [[享保]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1719年]][[4月25日]]) - [[井伊直陽]]、[[越後国|越後]][[与板藩]]第2代藩主（+[[1732年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[嘉応]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1170年]][[4月6日]]） - [[源為朝]]、[[武将]]（* [[1139年]]）（1177年とも） * [[宝永]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1711年]][[4月23日]]） - [[京極宮文仁親王]]、[[日本]]の[[皇族]]（* [[1680年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 6|qq=March 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|qq=}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|qq=}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|qq=}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|qq=}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|qq=}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|qq=}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|qq=}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|5|3|7|2|6|4|3|0306|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|qq=|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|qq=|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|qq=|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|qq=|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|qq=|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|qq=|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|qq=|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|qq=|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|qq=|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|qq=|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|qq=|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|qq=|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|qq=|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|qq=|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|qq=|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|qq=|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|qq=|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|qq=|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|qq=|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|qq=|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|qq=|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|qq=|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|qq=|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|qq=|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|qq=|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|qq=|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|qq=|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|qq=|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|qq=|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|qq=|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|qq=|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|qq=|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Enryaku|Enryaku]] 22 ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:803|803]] [[:en:April 1|April 1]] ) - [[:en:Shogun|Seii Taishōgun]] , [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro]] was ordered to construct [[:en:Shiwa Castle|Shiwa Castle]] {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * [[:en:Einin|Einin]] 5 (Julian calendar [[:en:1297|1297]] [[:en:March 30|March 30]] ) - The [[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura shogunate]] issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:March 29|March 29]] ) - The [[:en:Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma]] . The reorganized forces of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 1 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1648|1648]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]] ) - [[:en:Konoe Motohiro|Konoe Motohiro]] , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ [[:en:1722|1722]] ). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 4 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1719|1719]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]] ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of [[:en:Yoita Domain|Yoita Domain]] in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+[[:en:1732|1732]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kaō (era)|Kaō]] 2 (Julian calendar [[:en:1170|1170]] [[:en:April 6|April 6]] ) - [[:en:Minamoto no Tametomo|Minamoto no Tametomo]] , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* [[:en:1139|1139]] ) (also said to be 1177). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 8 (Gregorian calendar [[:en:1711|1711]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]] ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* [[:en:1680|1680]] ).
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初六]][[zh:三月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初六]][[zh:三月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初六]][[zh:三月初六]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 6|qq=March 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|803|en|803|WD=Q30388|lt=803}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1}} ) - {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|WD=Q131767|lt=Seii Taishōgun}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|en|Shiwa Castle|WD=Q11491083|lt=Shiwa Castle}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * {{ill|Einin|en|Einin|WD=Q1327307|lt=Einin}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|en|1297|WD=Q5562|lt=1297}} {{ill|March 30|en|March 30|WD=Q2460|lt=March 30}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|WD=Q2459|lt=March 29}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|en|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|WD=Q715567|lt=Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|en|Konoe Motohiro|WD=Q922862|lt=Konoe Motohiro}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|en|1719|WD=Q6902|lt=1719}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|en|Yoita Domain|WD=Q898364|lt=Yoita Domain}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+{{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|WD=Q1150842|lt=Kaō}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|en|1170|WD=Q19681|lt=1170}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|WD=Q2506|lt=April 6}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|en|Minamoto no Tametomo|WD=Q1339356|lt=Minamoto no Tametomo}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|en|1711|WD=Q6866|lt=1711}} {{ill|April 23|en|April 23|WD=Q2527|lt=April 23}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* {{ill|1680|en|1680|WD=Q7642|lt=1680}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|803|en|803|WD=Q30388|lt=803}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1}} ) - {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|WD=Q131767|lt=Seii Taishōgun}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|en|Shiwa Castle|WD=Q11491083|lt=Shiwa Castle}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * {{ill|Einin|en|Einin|WD=Q1327307|lt=Einin}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|en|1297|WD=Q5562|lt=1297}} {{ill|March 30|en|March 30|WD=Q2460|lt=March 30}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Einin Tokuseirei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|WD=Q2459|lt=March 29}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|en|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|WD=Q715567|lt=Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|en|Konoe Motohiro|WD=Q922862|lt=Konoe Motohiro}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|en|1719|WD=Q6902|lt=1719}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|en|Yoita Domain|WD=Q898364|lt=Yoita Domain}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+{{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|WD=Q1150842|lt=Kaō}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|en|1170|WD=Q19681|lt=1170}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|WD=Q2506|lt=April 6}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|en|Minamoto no Tametomo|WD=Q1339356|lt=Minamoto no Tametomo}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|en|1711|WD=Q6866|lt=1711}} {{ill|April 23|en|April 23|WD=Q2527|lt=April 23}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* {{ill|1680|en|1680|WD=Q7642|lt=1680}} ).

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|WD=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} 22 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|803|en|803|WD=Q30388|lt=803|1=803}} {{ill|April 1|en|April 1|WD=Q2510|lt=April 1|1=April 1}} ) - {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|WD=Q131767|lt=Seii Taishōgun|1=Shogun}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} was ordered to construct {{ill|Shiwa Castle|en|Shiwa Castle|WD=Q11491083|lt=Shiwa Castle|1=Shiwa Castle}} {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} . * {{ill|Einin|en|Einin|WD=Q1327307|lt=Einin|1=Einin}} 5 (Julian calendar {{ill|1297|en|1297|WD=Q5562|lt=1297|1=1297}} {{ill|March 30|en|March 30|WD=Q2460|lt=March 30|1=March 30}} ) - The {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} issued the {{ill|Einin Tokuseirei|ja|永仁の徳政令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Einin Tokuseirei|1=Q11549866|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549866}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|WD=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}} ) - The {{ill|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|en|Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|WD=Q715567|lt=Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma|1=Battle of Kōshū-Katsunuma}} . The reorganized forces of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi|1=Shinsengumi}} , the {{ill|Kōyō Chinbutai|ja|甲陽鎮撫隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyō Chinbutai|1=Kōyō Chinbutai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11578017}} , were defeated by the {{ill|Imperial Army (Japan)|ja|官軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Army (Japan)|1=kangun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10809959}} at Kōshū-Katsunuma.
== Births == * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648|1=1648}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|en|Konoe Motohiro|WD=Q922862|lt=Konoe Motohiro|1=Konoe Motohiro}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722|1=1722}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|en|1719|WD=Q6902|lt=1719|1=1719}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|en|Yoita Domain|WD=Q898364|lt=Yoita Domain|1=Yoita Domain}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+{{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732|1=1732}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|WD=Q1150842|lt=Kaō|1=Kaō (era)}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|en|1170|WD=Q19681|lt=1170|1=1170}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|WD=Q2506|lt=April 6|1=April 6}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|en|Minamoto no Tametomo|WD=Q1339356|lt=Minamoto no Tametomo|1=Minamoto no Tametomo}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139|1=1139}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|en|1711|WD=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}} {{ill|April 23|en|April 23|WD=Q2527|lt=April 23|1=April 23}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* {{ill|1680|en|1680|WD=Q7642|lt=1680|1=1680}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1648|en|1648|WD=Q6941|lt=1648|1=1648}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}} ) - {{ill|Konoe Motohiro|en|Konoe Motohiro|WD=Q922862|lt=Konoe Motohiro|1=Konoe Motohiro}} , {{ill|Kuge|ja|Kugyō|1=Kugyō|2=ja|3=公卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuge|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3138036}} (+ {{ill|1722|en|1722|WD=Q6918|lt=1722|1=1722}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1719|en|1719|WD=Q6902|lt=1719|1=1719}} {{ill|April 25|en|April 25|WD=Q2531|lt=April 25|1=April 25}} ) - {{ill|Ii Naoharu|ja|井伊直陽|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ii Naoharu|1=Ii Naoharu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11161481}} , 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Yoita Domain|en|Yoita Domain|WD=Q898364|lt=Yoita Domain|1=Yoita Domain}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+{{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732|1=1732}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kaō (era)|en|Kaō (era)|WD=Q1150842|lt=Kaō|1=Kaō (era)}} 2 (Julian calendar {{ill|1170|en|1170|WD=Q19681|lt=1170|1=1170}} {{ill|April 6|en|April 6|WD=Q2506|lt=April 6|1=April 6}} ) - {{ill|Minamoto no Tametomo|en|Minamoto no Tametomo|WD=Q1339356|lt=Minamoto no Tametomo|1=Minamoto no Tametomo}} , {{ill|Bushi|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushi|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (* {{ill|1139|en|1139|WD=Q19608|lt=1139|1=1139}} ) (also said to be 1177). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1711|en|1711|WD=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}} {{ill|April 23|en|April 23|WD=Q2527|lt=April 23|1=April 23}} ) - {{ill|Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|ja|京極宮文仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōgoku no Miya Fumihito Shinnō|1=Kyōgoku-no-miya Ayahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10883186}} , a {{ill|Japanese imperial family|ja|皇族|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese imperial family|1=Imperial Family of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11581068}} member (* {{ill|1680|en|1680|WD=Q7642|lt=1680|1=1680}} ).
